scripts.dev: npm run setup && npm run preflight && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix octofit-tracker/backend && npm install --prefix octofit-tracker/frontend
scripts.preflight: npm run check && npm run mongo:ensure && npm run seed
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build --prefix octofit-tracker/backend && npm run build --prefix octofit-tracker/frontend
scripts.mongo:ensure: ps aux | grep mongod | grep -v grep | grep '/mongod' || brew services start mongodb/brew/mongodb-community
